_comment: Copy this to .claude/settings.json in your project root. Adjust SOURCE_DIRS in scripts/check-lld-exists.sh to match your layout.
_hook_path_note: Hook commands use "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" so they resolve regardless of the hook's working directory. Never use bare repo-relative paths like 'bash .claude/hooks/X.sh' — they throw 'No such file or directory' when the hook cwd is not the project root.

_hook_modes._comment: Set LLD_HOOK_MODE in env above. warn = log but allow writes. block = hard block writes with no LLD.
_hook_modes.warn: Use during initial rollout — teams see the warning but can still write
_hook_modes.block: Use once manifest + LLDs are complete for all active domains
